TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Al Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 4, Al Beard, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al Beard mqwas biru sa H. A. Hunt pqwsan biru seneng, Fort Valley, Georgia, U.S. Al Beard mqwas biru sa Norfolk State pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Beard hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. t'aring sa kawas 1967, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. maki sa kawas 1968 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al βear* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, al βear*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja al βear* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħ. a. ħunt pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, *ort *allej, ɣeorɣia, u.s~ɕ. al βear* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa nor*olk s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja al βear* ħija ɣa s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnawʔ mariʔ nβa. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa ru mqwas~ɕ. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa mħŋaw ini ptzjuwaw la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Al Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 4, Al Beard, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al Beard mqwas biru sa H. A. Hunt pqwsan biru seneng, Fort Valley, Georgia, U.S. Al Beard mqwas biru sa Norfolk State pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Beard hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. t'aring sa kawas 1967, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. maki sa kawas 1968 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
